title: Japan Financial Statements (EDINET Official)
description: Normalized balance sheet, income statement and cash flow of Japanese listed companies from official EDINET annual reports. Pass doc_ids (e.g. from the Japan Company Filings Actor), or pick a date range. The first 3 documents of every run are free.

doc_ids.title: EDINET document IDs (main path)
doc_ids.description: EDINET document IDs of annual securities reports (docTypeCode 120/130), e.g. from the doc_id field of the Japan Company Filings (EDINET Official) Actor. Takes precedence over the date range. Up to 500 per run.

date_from.title: From date (alternative path)
date_from.description: Start of the submission-date range (YYYY-MM-DD). Used only when doc_ids is empty; annual securities reports submitted in the range are processed.

date_to.title: To date (alternative path)
date_to.description: End of the submission-date range (YYYY-MM-DD), inclusive. Up to 31 days are scanned and up to 500 matching documents are processed per run.

edinet_codes.title: EDINET codes (optional filter)
edinet_codes.description: With the date range: only keep filings by these EDINET filer codes (e.g. E02385).

sec_codes.title: Securities codes (optional filter)
sec_codes.description: With the date range: only keep filings by these securities codes (e.g. 79850 for 7985).

include_amendments.title: Include amendments
include_amendments.description: With the date range: also include amended annual reports (document type 130).
